comments.comment: Overall the facility had similar generation to 2020 however, Unit 1 had lower generation.  Units 2&3 have SCR while Unit 1 does not.  This meant that the overall NOx emissions were less despite the facility production being similar

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Speciated VOC's were not previously reported if the total VOC's were reported under threshold as per the former reporting requirements. However, changes made to the reporting requirements now require speciated VOC's to be reported if emissions exceed a 1 tonne threshold, regardless of the total VOC emissions.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Speciated VOC's were not previously reported if the total VOC's were reported under threshold as per the former reporting requirements. However, changes made to the reporting requirements now require speciated VOC's to be reported if emissions exceed a 1 tonne threshold, regardless of the total VOC emissions.
